interestingFact: The world population crossed 8 billion in 2022 and continues to grow steadily.
Nepal is home to Mount Everest, the highest peak on Earth at 8,848.86 meters.
Egypt's Nile River is the longest river in the world, stretching over 6,650 km.
Australia is the only country that is also a continent.
Brazil has the largest rainforest in the world — the Amazon.
France is the most visited country in the world.
Russia spans 11 time zones, more than any other country.
China has the largest population in the world after India (as of recent estimates).
